sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي الْأَطْفَالُ سَاعَاتٍ طَوِيلَةً أَمَامَ الشَّاشَاتِ الْإِلِكْتْرُونِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca provode duge sate ispred elektronskih ekrana.
sentences.translationEn: Children spend long hours in front of electronic screens.

sentences.arabic: يَنْصَحُ الْأَطِبَّاءُ بِتَقْلِيلِ وَقْتِ اسْتِخْدَامِ الْهَوَاتِفِ الذَّكِيَّةِ لِلْحِفَاظِ عَلَى الصِّحَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljekari savjetuju smanjenje vremena korištenja pametnih telefona radi očuvanja zdravlja.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors advise reducing smartphone usage time to maintain health.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الْأَفْضَلِ مُمَارَسَةُ الرِّيَاضَةِ أَوِ الْقِرَاءَةِ فِي أَوْقَاتِ الْفَرَاغِ.
sentences.translation: Bolje je baviti se sportom ili čitanjem u slobodno vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: It is better to practice sports or reading in free time.
